dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the enterprise is not going as planned. Your work to {quest_action} uncovered something we did not expect.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_threat_The} {quest_threat_is} far more dangerous than we anticipated. {quest_ally} barely made it back from {quest_focus_the} alive. The {enemy_type_plural} have massed {location_hint} and they need to be fought through before we can continue.
dialogueChunks.outro: We have come too far to turn back now. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} within reach.

dialogueChunks.intro: Complications, {player_name}. After you managed to {quest_action}, we triggered something. {quest_threat_The} {quest_threat_has} become agitated.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {enemy_type_plural} are now actively guarding the area around {quest_focus_the}. {quest_ally} thinks we need to deal with them directly before we can proceed. They have been concentrated {location_hint}.
dialogueChunks.outro: We are so close. Clear the way and {quest_stakes_the} will be ours.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I will not sugarcoat it. Our attempt to {quest_action} hit a wall. {quest_threat_animate_The} destroyed our preparations.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We need to start over, and quickly. {quest_ally} says there is an alternate approach through an area {location_hint}, but the {enemy_type_plural} have been seen there in force. Someone needs to push through and eliminate them so we can try a second approach.
dialogueChunks.outro: {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} slipping further away every day we delay. Are you still with us?

dialogueChunks.intro: The first breach brought down something worse than expected, {player_name}. {quest_threat_animate_The} was dormant until we disturbed it.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The deeper chambers near {quest_focus_the} are swarming with {enemy_type_plural} that were not there before. {quest_ally} thinks our activity woke something ancient {location_hint}. The creatures are pouring out of passages we did not know existed.
dialogueChunks.outro: Kill them before they spread beyond the site. If they reach the surface in these numbers, {quest_stakes_the} will be the least of our problems.

dialogueChunks.intro: We underestimated the {enemy_type_plural}, {player_name}. They are not mindless. They set a trap near {quest_focus_the}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} walked into it and barely escaped. The creatures collapsed the main approach {location_hint} and are using the bottleneck to ambush anyone who tries to get through. We need a different strategy: hunt them from behind while they watch the front.
dialogueChunks.outro: Circle around and hit them where they are not expecting it. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} worth the risk.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, a rival expedition reached the area ahead of us. They failed, and their failure made our job harder.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Their botched attempt scattered the {enemy_type_plural} across a wider area {location_hint}. {quest_ally} says the creatures are now patrolling aggressively where they were once stationary. We need them thinned out before we can make our own approach to {quest_focus_the}.
dialogueChunks.outro: Their loss, our opportunity: but only if we act fast. Kill the {enemy_type_plural} before they settle into their new positions.
